nodes.name: Your Known Data
nodes.notes: Edit these fields with the person's LinkedIn URL and the information you already have about them.

nodes.name: Fetch LinkedIn Profile (PDL)
nodes.notes: Calls the People Data Labs API to enrich the LinkedIn profile. Replace YOUR_PDL_API_KEY with your actual key.

nodes.name: Compare Data
nodes.notes: Compares your known data with the fetched LinkedIn data and shows which fields match.

nodes.name: Has Changes?
nodes.notes: Checks if any field has changed (Different or Data missing)

nodes.name: Format Changes
nodes.notes: Formats the changed fields into a clean list for notification

nodes.name: No Changes
nodes.notes: All fields match - no action needed
